docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE PEARL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOSS, LUCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE PEARL $1,637.50 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,727.50, PLAINTIFF GOSS'S BALANCE OF MONEY PAID TO DEFENDANT PEARL IS $5782. PLAINTIFF HAS UNTIL DEC-31-2022 TO USE THE BALANCE TOWARDS A FUTURE EVENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THE PEARL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2021 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GOSS, LUCY AS TO DEFENDANT THE PEARL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (JON LARNER [GM] FOR THE PEARL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOSS, LUCY AS TO DEFENDANT THE PEARL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LUCY GOSS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE PEARL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JON LARNER, GENERAL MANAGER. DEFENDANT STATES SERVICE WAS PROPER. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
